channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 17 com severidade Alta
• 1 novas CVEs
• 4 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

📰 Critical Grafana Vulnerabilities Let Attackers Achieve Remote Code Execution - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Grafana, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 Flow Society Boys S’Mores Society Attack Short – Breathable Mesh Athletic Shorts With Elastic Waist - aplusme.me
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Elastic, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMilAFBVV95cUxPSTZOaGZlWWYtcm5TY1ZvbXBlOVg5UklGek8yQWFrVFAxWHZEMlM5aGFnNmJPSmFSTUpXbGdUZnAxVlZObmJJOVVXU01EN3dhWWh3Q3A2X2pyek0yenpHR2lDT0l0WHFrcU9WOFVEMXZiOVo1TW0tMDVHZlFILU9WX2d2eHpaVVpuTVRxc0lZWVVwakc1?oc=5
 
📰 PATIKIL 6 Pcs D-Ring Patch Kit With Elastic Cords - Stainless Steel For Inflatable Boat, SUP, Kayak - ruhrkanal.news
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Elastic, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxNd180OE5QdGtUM1JQSGtUcWYtRExYVENQUngtYm96aE5nRVUtRjFkWGY4S0ZmdEFRUG1uSmprNzNqa0FCODdjaTBYMy1EMDJQWXhqaHZnRDZSMDFJeU5FM0hoZzRsSWlNN2tBNlZjTGd0NzNaOW5JTFd1X1JNZEdNaUQ2Vnluazhxbk5ZY0kzMlYtQUE?oc=5
 
📰 Kids' Boho Patch Pants – Super Soft Rayon, Elastic Waist & Ankles, Comfy & Stylish For Play & Lounge - aplusme.me
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Elastic, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxQQWF5SDhHd3pXbnNBYWdiZ3R3YS1KVkxqM1Vib2VXek5aTXo4bF9rdzdWeWJpbjZXak9oYTgzVnBBb2lsZ0Y1cE9sUlNuWkhFMk9NcW52Rno3MjUzcHZIMExDV1hna09ORlBHWDRvRWF2Nm8xT0ZsQmZGTzk4X1dZdV9zeGZoMTVCcUQ5Z0k0U2wycUdQQWlyMg?oc=5
 
📰 Migrating from Ingress NGINX to Gateway API with Istio – The Procrastinator’s Guide
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Why You’re Reading This (and Why It’s Not Too Late) The deadline: March 31, 2026 — three days from now.The situation: Ingress NGINX stops receiving security patches forever.The reality: You’re still running it in production. In November 2025, the Kubernetes project announced Ingress NGINX’s retirement. If you waited until the last minute, you’re not alone; …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/03/28/ingress-nginx-to-gateway-api-istio-vks-migration/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

💣 Hackers now exploit critical F5 BIG-IP flaw in attacks, patch now
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
F5 has reclassified a BIG-IP APM denial-of-service (DoS) vulnerability as a critical-severity remote code execution (RCE) flaw, warning that attackers are exploiting it to deploy webshells on unpatched devices.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-now-exploit-critical-f5-big-ip-flaw-in-attacks-patch-now/
 
💣 Critical Fortinet Forticlient EMS flaw now exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Attackers are now actively exploiting a critical vulnerability in Fortinet's FortiClient EMS platform, according to threat intelligence company Defused.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-fortinet-forticlient-ems-flaw-now-exploited-in-attacks/
 
💣 File read flaw in Smart Slider plugin impacts 500K WordPress sites
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A vulnerability in the Smart Slider 3 WordPress plugin, active on more than 800,000 websites, can be exploited to allow subscriber-level users access to arbitrary files on the server.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/file-read-flaw-in-smart-slider-plugin-impacts-500k-wordpress-sites/
 
📰 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Telecom Sleeper Cells, LLM Jailbreaks, Apple Forces U.K. Age Checks and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Long-running operations are finally hitting courtrooms, old attack methods are showing up in new places, and research that stopped being theoretical right around the time defenders stopped paying attention. Persistence plays, legal wins, influence ops, and at least one thing that looks boring
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/weekly-recap-telecom-sleeper-cells-llm.html
 
📰 Three China-Linked Clusters Target Southeast Asian Government in 2025 Cyber Campaign
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Three threat activity clusters aligned with China have targeted a government organization in Southeast Asia as part of what has been described as a "complex and well-resourced operation." The campaigns have led to the deployment of various malware families, including HIUPAN (aka USBFect, MISTCLOAK, or U2DiskWatch), PUBLOAD, EggStremeFuel (aka RawCookie), EggStremeLoader (aka Gorem RAT), MASOL
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/three-china-linked-clusters-target.html
 
📰 Two Iraqi forces killed in Mosul checkpoint attack - Yeni Safak English
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Check Point, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxPVEF2YmtDVXBucmE2OWFZbi11aHpwd3JXY2dCcUhuSlJ2ZDE2Wjh1al9GRmJZdUlFckRoajFpS3MyRjVmWmdRTUlING1MZHNKR21hTVV1NUJqWE1Sc3JnamxHOWJaOGo1TFJ6aENmY1ZEY2dJakpqaUhtSTV6OGx5X3NobUlESGJkLUE2d1VFd1Y4TlE?oc=5
 
📰 Iran-Linked Hackers Breach FBI Director’s Personal Email, Hit Stryker With Wiper Attack
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors with ties to Iran successfully broke into the personal email account of Kash Patel, the director of the U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI), and leaked a cache of photos and other documents to the internet. Handala Hack Team, which carried out the breach, said on its website that Patel "will now find his name among the list of successfully hacked victims." In a statement
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/iran-linked-hackers-breach-fbi.html
 
📰 Lebanese army: Israeli attack kills soldier at al-Amriyeh checkpoint - LBCI Lebanon
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Check Point, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOZjB1RHI3Y1pDSmMzWklDQ3YwcG0taDdHRFRsVlpvSmxBTzdMUzN1cEpGVXEtRVRmRUNOLTg2cHk3NlVFVmZWRXVYbjEwd0MzNjM3S3VvZGdJRzY1RlVIMVk2T2tfTHdiUXZ4ZXBDVlgzeEFIYVo2RGlQLXpEQVFjVU9uYkxJY1lzZnYyZTBxZU10WlY0TDhDUThVcHM1NFBaNTdaN2NhTm4tTnFjczBMRlN0NlhEdTV3M2xn?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-2602 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.4
Resumo:
The Twentig plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'featuredImageSizeWidth' parameter in versions up to, and including, 1.9.7 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2602
 
💣 Pirates are daring teams to exploit one obvious weakness early - Rum Bunter
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxPc3J1U0IyNW9feFZlU2Iyd3NOUUJTQk8wUTMta2x4UEs3MjlHakROLU9zaHdBTHUxVkpPUGdiRTFVT0l5VzBQeW1BV0JsSkZETzQweUJ3VkJsVUx5dDBCVlVTMDN3a0cxazhnSjBTYkJ4cGl6UjVXemhrcXZsMFFOdWpoTGVfVjNrUkpaMkM3MDNSanpBN3FqUXFfS1JYUQ?oc=5
 
📰 USN-8129-1: pyasn1 vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that pyasn1 incorrectly handled recursion when decoding ASN.1 data. An attacker could use this issue to cause pyasn1 to consume resources, leading to a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8129-1
 
📰 How to Harden Ubuntu SSH: From static keys to cloud identity
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
30 years after its introduction, Secure Shell (SSH) remains the ubiquitous gateway for administration, making it a primary target for brute force attacks and lateral movement within enterprise environments. For system administrators and security architects operating under the weight of regulatory frameworks like SOC2, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS, default SSH configurations are an “open door” that […]
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/how-to-harden-ubuntu-ssh-cloud
 
📰 Microsoft’s March Security Update of High-Risk Vulnerability Notice for Multiple Products - Security Boulevard
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxONVFpNTI4QU15eHd1ODlValBxWDdlUDBheS1qV1Z6Y2ZCUHFDVjRLR1NGTjQ3eVlxMWtjdE8xLVpLbzRzZUZlUUk0ZVVlSnFNTFNiNm1vVXJUQnl6NzBmZWpoOTNPNlRWQjF3NnRWdThNeDloTUF1YkRtaXFweWlkYW5hT1Fyd2txN3U5Z3VkWEtBZkZNdUVMWlNfWVJvMG9mc2VDbS04anFzelVXcmF5LVZ5aERjSG51ZjdyMjc1Uk1JRHZoQ1E?oc=5
 
📰 PSL 2026: Afridi, Raza Accused Of Security Breach For Escorting Visitors Into Hotel Room – Report - Outlook India
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 USN-8131-1: GStreamer Good Plugins vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that GStreamer Good Plugins incorrectly handled certain X-QDM RTP payloads. A remote attacker could use this issue to cause GStreamer Good Plugins to crash, resulting in a denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8131-1
 
📰 Oil prices surge 4% after Houthi attack on Israel, head for third straight monthly gain. What’s the near-term outlook? - Mint
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Oil prices surge 4% after Houthi attack on Israel, head for third straight monthly gain.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 28/03/2026 até 30/03/2026.
